store_headline: Nordic Folk and Viking Music WordPress Theme
store_subheadline: Built for folk, Viking, and Norse-inspired artists with discography, events, and merch.
features: Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value) included
Event listing and tour date functionality
Video gallery with custom player options
Portfolio custom post type with advanced filtering
Wolf WPBakery Extension with music-specific elements
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Multiple blog layout options (grid, masonry, metro)
Social sharing integration across multiple platforms
selling_points: Runic typography unique in the WordPress theme market — no other theme offers authentic Norse visual identity
Earthy Viking textures and misty forest imagery that self-select the exact audience the moment they see the site
The most niche-specific aesthetic in the catalog — folk and Viking metal bands buy it; there's no alternative
Buyers choose Reinar because no other WordPress theme looks like it — the visual identity is the differentiator
Complete music feature set — discography, events, portfolio, WooCommerce merch — the aesthetic doesn't compromise functionality
Wolf Playlist Manager for in-page audio playback with a player that doesn't break the Norse atmosphere
WooCommerce merch store lets bands sell rune-printed apparel and physical releases directly to fans
key_benefits: Signal Norse genre identity the moment the site loads; no bio needed
Attract folk and Viking metal audiences through genre-specific visual language
Build a band site with runic typography that exists nowhere else
Sell merch and music to a deeply loyal niche audience
Showcase discography, tour dates, and videos in a world that fits
Own a category: no comparable Viking or folk metal WordPress theme exists
design_features: Earthy color palette with natural tones
Custom music player with playlist support
Natural textures and authentic Viking visual elements

testimonials.text: I had my eye on this theme forever, and now that I'm using it I could not be more pleased. It's easy to configure and there are tons of options.
testimonials.author: amnion

testimonials.text: Beautiful template & extremely helpful customer support! Thank you
testimonials.author: candacelecamusic

testimonials.text: Everything about this theme is awesome! From Code Quality to Documentation Quality to Customizability...It literally ROCKS! Takes a little bit of time to setup, but man...what a great theme! I originally bought it for the band I was in a few years back, but now that band is no longer together, I'm now using for my own solo endeavor! I'll be looking to Wolff Themes in the near future for other themes for sure! Thanks guys!
testimonials.author: SpokaneDrummer
